song.title: Has Thou Heard Him
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Hast thou heard Him, Seen Him, known Him? Is not thine a captured heart? Chief among ten thousand own Him; Joyful choose the better part.
[C] Chorus Captivated by His beauty, Worthy tribute haste to bring; Let His peerless worth constrain thee, Crown Him now unrivaled King.
[V2] 2) Idols once they won thee, charmed thee, Lovely things of time and sense; Gilded thus does sin disarm thee, Honeyed lest thou turn thee thence.
[V3] 3) What has stripped the seeming beauty From the idols of the earth? Not a sense of right or duty, But the sight of peerless worth.
[V4] 4) Not the crushing of those idols, With its bitter void and smart; But the beaming of His beauty, The unveiling of His heart.
[V5] 5) Who extinguishes their taper Till they hail the rising sun? Who discards the garb of winter Till the summer has begun?
[V6] 6) ’Tis that look that melted Peter, ’Tis that face that Stephen saw, ’Tis that heart that wept with Mary, Can alone from idols draw:
[V7] 7) Draw and win and fill completely, Till the cup o’erflow the brim; What have we to do with idols Who have companied with Him?
song.author: Ora Rowan
